raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California experiences unacceptably high rates of firearm-related death and injury.",
    "The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention reported 3,184 gun-related deaths in California in 2017.",
    "The UC Davis Firearm Violence Research Center would establish multifaceted firearm-safety education and training programs for medical and mental health providers.",
    "Medical and mental health care providers are uniquely positioned to help prevent all forms of firearm-related harm.",
    "Many medical and mental health providers cite lack of knowledge as the principal barrier to action in preventing firearm-related death and injury.",
    "Expanded education and training are needed to improve clinician familiarity with the benefits and risks of firearm ownership, safety practices, and communication with patients about firearm violence.",
    "Appropriate discussions of firearm safety can help prevent firearm-related death and injury."
  ]
}
```
